sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before_seg['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after_seg['nodes']}

changed = []
for nid in after_nodes:
    an = after_nodes[nid]
    bn = before_nodes.get(nid)
    if bn is None:
        changed.append(nid)
    elif an['boundary'] != bn['boundary'] or an['color'] != bn['color'] or an['pixels'] != bn['pixels']:
        changed.append(nid)

print("Changed IDs: " + str(changed))
for nid in changed:
    an = after_nodes[nid]
    bn = before_nodes.get(nid)
    print("ID=" + str(nid) + ":")
    if bn:
        print("  before: color=" + bn['color'] + " pixels=" + str(bn['pixels']))
    print("  after: color=" + an['color'] + " pixels=" + str(an['pixels']))
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
